title: Dedicated Agents Tab
summary: Implemented a dedicated `/agents` workspace with registry filters, inspect/edit panels, lifecycle controls, logs and runtime inspection, moved agent management out of `/dashboard`, and redirected the builder plus legacy dashboard links into the new flow.
next_action: No further implementation work is pending. Optional manual product validation can confirm stop/delete behavior and the end-to-end `/agents` operator flow in production.

verification.notes: `mix precommit` passed on 2026-03-12 after adding the new `AgentsLive` workspace, updating authenticated navigation and builder redirects, carving agent management out of `/dashboard`, covering legacy `/dashboard?id=...` redirects, and adding focused LiveView coverage for CRUD and lifecycle actions.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Implemented the dedicated Agents workspace and verified the repo with the full precommit gate.
resume_context.notes: The key implementation decisions were to make `/agents` the only operator home for agent CRUD and runtime inspection, keep creation on `/agents/new` with redirects back into `/agents?id=...`, and replace dashboard agent controls with a narrower control-center CTA surface.

history.note: Initial draft created from repo context and user decisions about dedicated agent management, `/agents/new` reuse, and dashboard simplification.
Implementation began for the dedicated `/agents` LiveView, navigation update, builder redirect changes, dashboard carve-out, and lifecycle-action reliability tests.
Implemented the dedicated Agents workspace, legacy dashboard redirects, updated builder/navigation flow, and verified the full repo with `mix precommit`.
